caption: A screen recording shows a web browser displaying a digital mapping tool on a dark background. The map contains several circular nodes connected by lines, with one node featuring a photo of people in a room filled with boxes and bags. A small circular profile icon of a person is visible nearby, accompanied by green text that reads "Community Mapping." The browser's address bar shows a URL containing "blackboard.ucla.edu," and several open tabs at the top include titles such as "Truth & Learning by Systemdyn," "Elements by Systemdyn," "Future of Society by Systemdyn," "Insights | Introduction | Kumu," and "Rural Community Food Syste." In the top right corner, a small video feed shows a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt. As the sequence progresses, the man in the video feed briefly disappears and then reappears.
